credential-inference-idiom.rule: The unified wire-form inference must preserve the existing anthropic idiom: a credential value beginning sk-ant-oat is an OAuth token -> build the client with authToken AND defaultHeaders { "anthropic-beta": "oauth-2025-04-20" }; a value beginning sk-ant-api (or default) -> build with apiKey (x-api-key). The only change is the credential SOURCE: read it from the single credentialEnv (default ANTHROPIC_API_KEY) instead of separate apiKeyEnv/authTokenEnv. useClaudeOauth keychain mode is untouched.

provider-discriminated-union.rule: The agent-mcp zod z.discriminatedUnion('type', [...]) must stay in lock-step with the ProviderConfig union in @adhd/agent-mcp-types/src/domain.ts: same members (anthropic | openai | claudecli - NO lmstudio), same credentialEnv/credentialType/baseURL fields. The normalize-on-load preprocess wraps the union input so legacy rows coerce to a valid member before discrimination.
